Bash(cd C:/wex-theory && py -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from database import engine, SessionLocal
import models
models.Base.metadata.create_all\(bind=engine\)
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import auth
db = SessionLocal\(\)
try:
    u = models.User\(email='admin@wex.com', name='Admin', password_hash=auth.get_password_hash\('admin123'\), expires_at=datetime.utcnow\(\)+timedelta\(days=365\), is_admin=True\)
    db.add\(u\)
    db.commit\(\)
    print\('User created:', u.id\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
    db.rollback\(\)
db.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/wex-theory && py -c "
from database import engine, get_db
from models import User
from auth import hash_password
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
db = next\(get_db\(\)\)
existing = db.query\(User\).filter\(User.email == 'admin@wex.com'\).first\(\)
if existing:
    db.delete\(existing\)
    db.commit\(\)
u = User\(name='Admin', email='admin@wex.com', password_hash=hash_password\('admin123'\),
         created_at=datetime.utcnow\(\), expires_at=datetime.utcnow\(\)+timedelta\(days=3650\), is_admin=True\)
db.add\(u\)
db.commit\(\)
print\(f'Admin created: id={u.id}'\)
")

Bash(py -c "
from PIL import Image
import os, pathlib

test_images = pathlib.Path\('C:/wex-theory/test-images'\)
converted = 0
total_before = 0
total_after = 0

for png in test_images.rglob\('*.png'\):
    jpg = png.with_suffix\('.jpg'\)
    total_before += png.stat\(\).st_size
    try:
        img = Image.open\(png\).convert\('RGB'\)
        img.save\(jpg, 'JPEG', quality=80, optimize=True\)
        total_after += jpg.stat\(\).st_size
        png.unlink\(\)
        converted += 1
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error {png}: {e}'\)

print\(f'Converted: {converted} files'\)
print\(f'Before: {total_before/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
print\(f'After:  {total_after/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
print\(f'Saved:  {\(total_before-total_after\)/1024/1024:.1f} MB \({100*\(total_before-total_after\)/total_before:.0f}%\)'\)
")

Bash(py -c "
from PIL import Image
import os, pathlib

test_images = pathlib.Path\('C:/wex-theory/test-images'\)
recompressed = 0
total_before = 0
total_after = 0

for jpg in test_images.rglob\('*.jpg'\):
    total_before += jpg.stat\(\).st_size
    try:
        img = Image.open\(jpg\).convert\('RGB'\)
        img.save\(jpg, 'JPEG', quality=55, optimize=True\)
        total_after += jpg.stat\(\).st_size
        recompressed += 1
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error {jpg}: {e}'\)

print\(f'Recompressed: {recompressed} files'\)
print\(f'Before: {total_before/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
print\(f'After:  {total_after/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
")

Bash(py -c "
from database import SessionLocal
from models import Question

db = SessionLocal\(\)
updated = 0
for q in db.query\(Question\).all\(\):
    if q.image_path and q.image_path.endswith\('.png'\):
        q.image_path = q.image_path[:-4] + '.jpg'
        updated += 1
db.commit\(\)
db.close\(\)
print\(f'Updated {updated} questions'\)
")
